baseline_topology.node_0021_role: backend_app_root primary node — IMPORTS=69 in 40.3, highest fan-out in structural topology

binding_envelope_vault.note: Baseline binding_envelope.json in vault is empty — signals NOT computed from binding_envelope

orchestrated_topology.canonical_topology_source: dom_path_domain_layer.json adapted (same DOM layer as baseline)
orchestrated_topology.node_0021_role: NODE-0021 is in DOM-04 (binding_context) — but signal computation did NOT use NODE-0021 directly; used CE-04 (component entity) as proxy

signal_computation_input.computation_basis: per_node fan_in/fan_out from CEU→DOM binding topology edges (GROUNDS/EXPOSES relations)
signal_computation_input.outlier_reason: CE-04 receives edges from DOM-08, DOM-09, DOM-04, DOM-05 (4 domains — highest fan_in in binding_envelope)

binding_envelope_vault.note: Orchestrated binding_envelope built by Phase 5 from CEU+DOM derivation. This is the actual signal computation input.

critical_delta.total_edges_differ: baseline total_edges=1937 (real import graph); orchestrated total_edges=0 (canonical_topology does not include PIOS edges)
signal_computation_explanation: BASELINE: Signals computed from 40.3 structural import graph (35 nodes, 1937 IMPORTS relations). PSIG-001 z-score based on NODE-0021 IMPORTS=69 as the outlier against a population of 35 nodes. This is REAL import topology.

ORCHESTRATED: Signals computed by PIOS compute_condition_correlation.py using binding_envelope.json (33 synthetic nodes, 29 synthetic edges). Fan_in counts reflect DOM→CE binding topology, NOT actual import counts. Population=33 nodes. CE-04 is the outlier with fan_in=4 (4 DOMs ground it).
critical_delta.delta_is_fundamental: The two signal computation graphs use different edge semantics (IMPORTS vs GROUNDS/EXPOSES), different populations (35 real structural nodes vs 33 synthetic binding nodes), and different outlier detection bases.

dom_04_note: dom_04_membership matches (NODE-0021, NODE-0022) in both canonical_topology.json files, but the DOM layers are not used as signal computation input — the binding_envelope graph is.
